comment.body:
Now because Alma doesn't give signals, I'm feeling pretty proud of myself right now. 
If it was any other substack, and someone said to long or short, I'd be either happy I trusted them and earned some coins, or I would be broke right now. Because I would repeat their actions. 
And in this case? I made my own decision (of course with guidance), earned a ton. Happy about it, closing the charts for the day.
